extractive_fidelity.detail: 10/10 claims in logic/claims.md judged faithful (load-bearing numbers AND asserted direction/polarity both match, no unsupported added clauses) against the actual full paper text (research/metrics/v3/fulltext/cum26.txt), per a frozen independent adversarial check (extractive_fidelity/cum26-alzheimer-s-disease-drug-development-pipeline.yaml) run by a different pass than the compiler that wrote claims.md. Infidelity types found: none. source_bound, not validated: this measures fidelity TO THE PAPER, not the paper's scientific validity (compiler-model.md's independent-axes caveat) — no paper-ranker should be treated as sound on this axis alone.

corrective_science_score.detail: 0/10 rw_blocks qualify (1 typed refutes/bounds present but baseline-relabeling / no contrastive Delta language / no claims_affected)

negative_result_share.detail: no semantic nulls, refuted claims, or genuine dead-ends found

dead_end_density.detail: no dead_end nodes in exploration_tree — nothing to fabricate or bind

detail.note: name-drop count; superseded by claim_graph per_claim_trial_concordance

semantic_grounding.detail: 16/17 (number,quote) findings pass string_present ∧ verdict==supports ∧ value_match∈{exact,rounded,derived} ∧ polarity_ok ∧ context_match, scored deterministically from the frozen logic/grounding_findings.yaml (a prior [sem] pass's output -- this module does not itself call an LLM, so self-grading is avoided by construction).

novel_claim_count.detail: 0/10 claims judged genuinely novel (within-ARA judge approximation only; real D4 needs cross-library FOL-dedup of Claim.original against the oshima store, not available on this corpus); verdict breakdown: {'incremental': 9, 'restatement': 1} (frozen judge findings, cum26-alzheimer-s-disease-drug-development-pipeline.yaml).

grounding_detail.detail: quotes_present=17, checkable=5 (in-repo .md pointer or PyMuPDF-resolved PDF, +5 boosted), unverifiable=12 (bare paper.pdf/§ pointer, no PDF resolution available/matched), verified=5, quote_not_found_extraction=0 (checkable but string-match failed even after NFKC+dash-fold+whitespace normalization -- an extraction/format issue, routed to trust_class/coverage, not scored as a semantic grounding failure) -> trust_class=mixed.
